stemHtml: For a given aeroplane mass, a more aft CG position will..

options.a: decrease the take-off distance and reduce the take-off climb performance.
options.b: increase the take-off distance and reduce the take-off climb performance.
options.c: decrease the take-off distance and improve the take-off climb performance.
options.d: increase the take-off distance and improve the take-off climb performance.
